commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=332f65bb2d0c953d2a37b86889a01cd7afca075a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a retry-once path for direct or nested undici `UND_ERR_SOCKET` failures inside `buildGuardedModelFetch`.

PR surface: Source +38. Total +38 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level path: the linked issue logs match a nested undici `UND_ERR_SOCKET`, current main routes Anthropic Messages through `buildGuardedModelFetch`, and current main rethrows that failure into model fallback. I did not live-reproduce the multi-hour stale-socket condition.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor needs to fix the retry-failure cleanup and provide real after-fix proof; automation cannot supply proof from the contributor's affected environment.

target.title: fix(anthropic): retry on UND_ERR_SOCKET keep-alive failures (#87407)
target.author: jincheng-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
